nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template environment file documenting all runtime configuration for the llama Mail stack, including the Ollama base URL and model cache, tuning file path, server base URL, mobile pairing secret, and the push/APNs relay endpoints.
nodes.languageNotes: Dotenv-style KEY=value pairs covering Ollama, IMAP/SMTP session, mobile pairing, and Cloudflare Worker relay URLs.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Contributor and AI-agent guidance document defining the 'ponytail' lazy-senior-dev coding stance, the DOX documentation framework (read-before-edit, update-after-edit, doc hierarchy), and an ultra-lite AI governance policy.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Primary project documentation for llama Mail covering features, architecture, requirements, quick-start setup, users and roles, environment variables, mobile pairing, Cloudflare push relays, persistence, API highlights, operations, and troubleshooting.
nodes.languageNotes: 22 sections spanning setup, API surface, and troubleshooting for a self-hosted IMAP client with Ollama labeling.

nodes.name: TUNING.md
nodes.summary: Prompt-tuning template for the Ollama email classifier that defines the allowed labels in priority order, classification rules, per-label definitions and triggers, and the expected input/output contract.
